---
title: "Glossary"
subtitle: "Every term, pinned where it was first defined."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

Terms are added here the first time they appear in the series, with a
link back to the question that introduced them. Alphabetical within
each letter group.

<!--
Convention for entries:

## Term
One- or two-sentence working definition, in the same plain register as
the posts. First appeared in [Q1](posts/q001/index.qmd).
-->

*The glossary grows with the series. First entries arrive with Q1.*
